title: Survey Vessel Sanshodhak
description: Source: PIB Subject: Security Context: The Indian Navy officially received ‘Sanshodhak’ (Yard 3028), the fourth and final ship of the Survey Vessel (Large) project. About Survey Vessel Sanshodhak: What It Is? Sanshodhak is the final vessel of the four Survey Vessel (Large) (SVL) class ships steered by the Indian Navy’s Warship Design Bureau.
